# ClaritX

> Free AI-powered stock analysis from 9 research perspectives. For educational purposes only — not investment advice.

ClaritX analyzes stocks, ETFs, funds, and cryptocurrencies from 9 dimensions: news sentiment, technical indicators, social media buzz, financial fundamentals, analyst ratings, peer comparison, insider activity, dividend health, and AI synthesis verdict. All analysis is for educational research purposes only.

## Key Facts

- **Free to use**: Core analysis tools require no subscription
- **9 research perspectives**: Each stock analyzed from news, technicals, social buzz, fundamentals, analyst ratings, peer comparison, insider activity, dividends, and AI synthesis
- **Coverage**: Stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, and cryptocurrencies listed on US exchanges
- **No financial advice**: Platform is strictly educational — not a broker, advisor, or recommendation service
- **AI-powered**: Uses large language models and real-time market data to generate research reports
- **Market Opportunities**: Daily AI scan of news catalysts surfaces stocks with real upcoming drivers
- **Portfolio Simulator**: Risk-profile-based portfolio builder — simulated, not a real brokerage account
- **Data sourcing**: Technical and fundamental data sourced from institutional-grade financial market data providers; coverage includes all US-listed equities, ETFs, and major cryptocurrencies

## Core Tools

- [AI Stock Analysis](https://www.claritx.ai/ai-stock-analysis): Analyze any stock with 9-perspective AI research including news, technicals, fundamentals, and more
- [AI Stock Rank](https://www.claritx.ai/ai-stock-rank): AI-generated quality rankings for 1,000+ stocks, ETFs, and funds
- [Portfolio Simulator](https://www.claritx.ai/portfolio-simulator): Build simulated portfolios based on your risk profile and investment preferences
- [Market Opportunities](https://www.claritx.ai/market-opportunities): News-driven market catalyst scanner for real-time opportunities
- [Browse Stocks](https://www.claritx.ai/stocks): Directory of individual stock analysis pages

## Learn

- [AI Stock Analysis Guide](https://www.claritx.ai/ai-stock-analysis-guide): Complete guide to 9-perspective AI stock research methodology
- [Investment Research Blog](https://www.claritx.ai/blog): Educational articles on investing, stock analysis, and portfolio building
- [Pricing](https://www.claritx.ai/pricing): Free and Pro plan details

## About

- [About ClaritX](https://www.claritx.ai/about): Mission, methodology, data sources, and editorial standards

ClaritX is a free AI-powered market research platform designed to help individual investors understand stocks from multiple angles before making their own informed decisions. The platform is not a financial advisor and does not provide personalized investment recommendations.

Contact: https://www.claritx.ai

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/claritx-ai
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ClaritX-ai
